_schema: County gossip banks — Director-authored (2026-07-03), verbatim. A bank with requires_flag only surfaces after that flag is set (this is the county remembering what you did). Flagged banks outrank general ones. Surfaced at the diner (Patti) and anywhere gossip_source nodes appear.
_status: director_approved; banks breakdown_kept_running, note_under_6000, note_cleared, bought_better_iron, county_hand, salvage_parts_used, serviced_iron appended ai_draft_needs_director_curation (2026-07-06)

lines: Heard somebody got Hollis baler going again.
Some folks fix equipment. Some folks fix reputations.
Word travels quicker than trucks around here.
You can keep a secret in Ash Creek about as long as a milkshake lasts.
Word is somebody tried fixing Hollis baler and managed to make Thursday more expensive.
Diner's already heard it.
Didn't take long for that story to get legs.
Heard you've been wrenching on things.
Maybe let Hollis work on that one.

Funny thing about this county.

Do what you say you'll do long enough and people stop checking.
Folks around here notice consistency more than talent.

People trust calendars more than promises.

You've been managing both.

Miss one handshake and folks call it bad luck.

Miss two and they start calling it a habit.

County doesn't expect perfection.

It expects a phone call.
Deadlines don't stay on paper around here.

Some folks see rust.

You saw supper money.
Heard you bought fresh paint with old trouble underneath.

Somebody's been running that 2010 broke.

You can hear it from the road.
Machines don't get quieter on their own.

Heard the 2010 clear from the co-op lot.

That ain't a compliment.

Earl's been almost pleasant lately.

Somebody's paying their note.
Folks notice who walks into the bank and who drives past it.
Word is a certain ledger's looking friendlier out your way.

Heard somebody paid the note off entire.

Earl had to sit down.

Free and clear.

County hasn't seen that in a while.

Paid off the bank.

Patti's been telling it like weather news.

A farm around here owing nothing.

People keep saying it out loud just to hear it.
New iron on the county road this week.

Saw the tractor.

Whole diner saw the tractor.

New paint turns heads.

Payments turn stomachs.
Seen you working half the county lately.

Folks say you'll show up wherever the work is.

That travels.
You've been on more farms than the feed truck.

Fixed his own with parts out of Gus's yard.

County respects that kind of stubborn.

Some folks buy new.

Some folks buy rust and make it run.
Gus don't sell to just anybody twice.

You never hear that tractor coming.

That's grease, not luck.

Some machines get run.

Yours get kept.
Quiet equipment says more than new equipment.
Saturday auction's got a couple tractors worth looking at.
Depends if you like projects.
Depends if you like surprises.
Bank loves good years. Bank remembers bad ones.
Interest don't sleep.
Payments don't care if it rained.
Nothing costs more than cheap equipment.
Except maybe brand new equipment.
People around here don't expect perfection. They just expect you to show up.
Help somebody once and they'll remember.
Help them twice and they'll call.
Everybody farms different. Weather humbles all of us the same.
Nobody's smarter than a drought.
Nobody outruns mud.
